subject: Baby in Tuffle Parasite humanoid form — blue-skinned lean fighter in a low combat crouch, arms raised, energy crackling around the body
description: A blue-skinned humanoid figure crouches in a combat-ready stance at the center of the frame. The figure is lean and compact, wearing minimal dark clothing, with arcs of purple-white energy radiating outward from the body. The background is a stormy purple-black void punctuated by crackling lightning and energy discharge. The overall composition frames the figure mid-crouch with arms held wide, suggesting coiled power about to be released. This is the BABY side (Leader card front) — the Tuffle Parasite in his slender parasitized form rather than the transformed Great Ape back side.
foreground: Blue-skinned humanoid fighter in low crouch, energy crackling outward
background: Dark stormy void with purple energy arcs and lightning
